summary.en: Equatorial Guinea's public electricity supply is served by SEGESA (Sociedad de Electricidad de Guinea Ecuatorial). The practical low-voltage engineering baseline is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz. EV charger projects should obtain site-level acceptance from SEGESA or the relevant project utility reviewer for supply capacity, earthing arrangement, protection coordination, metering, harmonic current, civil/electrical installation, commissioning, and operating responsibility. Equatorial Guinea has a small, nascent grid-tie EV charging market, so project-specific utility conditions are more important than assuming a mature national EVSE rulebook.
summary.zh: 赤道几内亚公共供电由SEGESA（Sociedad de Electricidad de Guinea Ecuatorial）负责。实务低压工程基线为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。电动汽车充电桩项目应就供电容量、接地方式、保护配合、计量、谐波电流、土建/电气安装、调试和运行责任取得SEGESA或相关项目电力审查方的现场级验收。赤道几内亚并网电动汽车充电市场规模小且处于早期阶段，因此项目级电力条件比假定已有成熟国家EVSE规则更重要。
summary.zht: 赤道幾內亞公共供電由SEGESA（Sociedad de Electricidad de Guinea Ecuatorial）負責。實務低壓工程基線為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。電動汽車充電樁項目應就供電容量、接地方式、保護配合、計量、諧波電流、土建/電氣安裝、調試和運行責任取得SEGESA或相關項目電力審查方的現場級驗收。赤道幾內亞併網電動汽車充電市場規模小且處於早期階段，因此項目級電力條件比假定已有成熟國家EVSE規則更重要。

standards_or_laws: SEGESA — Sociedad de Electricidad de Guinea Ecuatorial utility connection acceptance
IEC 61851-1 — conductive EV supply equipment general requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Project-specific electrical installation and utility acceptance conditions

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly validated for 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. Equatorial Guinea shares the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but its nominal voltage differs: 230/400 V versus China 220/380 V. Input voltage range, protection thresholds, transformer or rectifier ratings, leakage-current behaviour, metering accuracy, and thermal loading must be checked for the 230/400 V condition.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，并依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930直流通信和当地电网运营商验收进行验证。赤道几内亚与中国同为50 Hz，但标称电压不同：赤道几内亚为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V。必须按230/400 V条件检查输入电压范围、保护阈值、变压器或整流器额定值、漏电流行为、计量准确性和热负荷。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，並依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930直流通訊和當地電網運營商驗收進行驗證。赤道幾內亞與中國同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同：赤道幾內亞為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V。必須按230/400 V條件檢查輸入電壓範圍、保護閾值、變壓器或整流器額定值、漏電流行為、計量準確性和熱負荷。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must document that the charger is rated and tested for 230/400 V, 50 Hz operation, not merely China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline. Obtain SEGESA or project-utility acceptance for supply capacity, transformer sizing, earthing, protection, load management, harmonic limits, metering, and commissioning. Because the market is nascent, project documents should explicitly define who approves the installation and who operates or maintains the charger after energisation.
gap.zh: 出口商必须记录充电桩已按230/400 V、50 Hz运行进行额定和测试，而不仅是中国220/380 V、50 Hz基线。应就供电容量、变压器容量、接地、保护、负载管理、谐波限值、计量和调试取得SEGESA或项目电力方验收。由于市场处于早期阶段，项目文件应明确谁批准安装，以及通电后由谁运营或维护充电桩。
gap.zht: 出口商必須記錄充電樁已按230/400 V、50 Hz運行進行額定和測試，而不僅是中國220/380 V、50 Hz基線。應就供電容量、變壓器容量、接地、保護、負載管理、諧波限值、計量和調試取得SEGESA或項目電力方驗收。由於市場處於早期階段，項目文件應明確誰批准安裝，以及通電後由誰運營或維護充電樁。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory — grid-connected installations require SEGESA or project utility acceptance; national EVSE-specific grid rules are not strongly published, so confirm conditions for each site
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a SEGESA approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Equatorial Guinea 230/400 V, 50 Hz

source.publisher: International Organization for Standardization (ISO) — country code and national context reference

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Same 50 Hz does not mean same grid configuration. A China 220/380 V charger package must be revalidated for Equatorial Guinea's 230/400 V network and accepted by SEGESA or the project utility reviewer before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 同为50 Hz并不等于电网配置相同。中国220/380 V充电桩资料包必须按赤道几内亚230/400 V电网重新验证，并在调试前取得SEGESA或项目电力审查方验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 同為50 Hz並不等於電網配置相同。中國220/380 V充電樁資料包必須按赤道幾內亞230/400 V電網重新驗證，並在調試前取得SEGESA或項目電力審查方驗收。
